meta.source: Public pricing pages — OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Cloud, Meta, Mistral, DeepSeek, Alibaba, Zhipu AI
meta.note: Flagship and current-generation models as of early 2026. Self-hosted prices are infra-cost estimates only. Verify all prices with provider before external claims.

gpt_5.name: GPT-5
gpt_5.notes: OpenAI flagship — strongest reasoning, coding, and multimodal

gpt_5_mini.name: GPT-5 Mini
gpt_5_mini.notes: Best-value OpenAI model — classification, extraction, routing

claude_opus_46.name: Claude Opus 4.6
claude_opus_46.notes: Anthropic flagship — research-grade reasoning and writing

claude_sonnet_45.name: Claude Sonnet 4.5
claude_sonnet_45.notes: Strong mid-tier — coding, analysis, tool use

claude_haiku_45.name: Claude Haiku 4.5
claude_haiku_45.notes: Fast and affordable — high-volume, low-complexity workloads

gemini_3_pro.name: Gemini 3 Pro
gemini_3_pro.notes: Google flagship via Vertex AI / AI Studio — strong on long context

gemini_25_flash.name: Gemini 2.5 Flash
gemini_25_flash.notes: Best cost/latency on Google stack — batch transforms, extraction

llama4_scout.name: Llama 4 Scout (Self-hosted, ~109B MoE)
llama4_scout.notes: Infra-driven cost estimate (H100 serving). 10M-token context, multimodal

llama4_maverick.name: Llama 4 Maverick (Self-hosted, ~400B MoE)
llama4_maverick.notes: Infra-driven cost estimate. Higher quality than Scout; GPU-heavy

mistral_large_3.name: Mistral Large 3
mistral_large_3.notes: 41B active MoE — leading open-source-friendly reasoning model

deepseek_v3.name: DeepSeek V3-0324
deepseek_v3.notes: Open-weights; competitive with GPT-4.5-class on math and coding

qwen35.name: Qwen3.5 397B (A17B active)
qwen35.notes: Open-source MoE — strong on agentic and long-context workloads

glm5.name: GLM-5
glm5.notes: Open-source contender — good for multilingual and long-context tasks

vertex_vector_search.name: Vertex AI Vector Search
vertex_vector_search.notes: Managed index + ops on Google Cloud

pinecone.name: Pinecone Serverless
pinecone.notes: Serverless — pay-per-use, storage per GB of raw vectors

pgvector.name: pgvector (self-hosted)
pgvector.notes: Postgres extension — cost is compute + ops overhead estimate

openai_marketplace.name: OpenAI GPT Store
openai_marketplace.notes: 30% revenue share — standard GPT Store terms

anthropic_marketplace.name: Anthropic Marketplace
anthropic_marketplace.notes: Estimated — verify with Anthropic for current terms

direct.name: Direct (Self-hosted)
direct.notes: No platform tax — you handle billing and distribution
